creator: Connie Loizos
title: (No AI) Europe is pushing back on Washington’s chip war
dc:creator: Connie Loizos
content: As ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet told TechCrunch in May, what China can currently buy are older-generation deep ultraviolet tools — gear first shipped about a decade ago — the same machines the MATCH Act would now put off-limits.
contentSnippet: As ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet told TechCrunch in May, what China can currently buy are older-generation deep ultraviolet tools — gear first shipped about a decade ago — the same machines the MATCH Act would now put off-limits.

content: Backed by Mayfield and Aramco Ventures, Vishal Sikka’s new venture brings together veterans from SAP, Infosys, and VianAI.

title: (No AI) Facebook’s Creator Studio has been revived as an AI companion app
author: Jess Weatherbed
content:
![Meta’s new Creator Studio app for Facebook creators.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/Facebook-Creator-Studio-relaunch.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

This is what the new Creator Studio app looks like, after the original service was shuttered in 2023. | Image: Meta

Meta is bringing back the [Facebook Creator Studio](https://creators.facebook.com/blog/introducing-new-facebook-creator-studio) page manager, now "reimagined" as a standalone AI companion app. The new app aims to make it easier for creators to connect with their audiences and show them "exactly how to grow on Facebook," according to Meta's announcement.

[Meta's AI Creator Assistant](https://about.fb.com/news/2026/06/creator-assistant-more-languages-for-ai-translations-on-facebook/) is a central focus of the newly reimagined app - users can ask the chatbot to provide performance tracking insights and tailored recommendations for improving engagement. It can also be used to find "the most important comments" left by the user's audience and "instantly draft replies in your voice."

![Examples of AI-powered commenting features inside the reimagined Facebook Creator Studio.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/Screenshot-2026-06-25-095344.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100 "Examples of AI-powered commenting features inside the reimagined Facebook Creator Studio.")

The Creator Studio app isn't widely ava …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/956668/meta-facebook-creator-studio-ai-app-relaunch)
contentSnippet:

Meta's AI Creator Assistant is a central focus of the newly reimagined app - users can ask the chatbot to provide performance tracking insights and tailored recommendations for improving engagement. It can also be used to find "the most important comments" left by the user's audience and "instantly draft replies in your voice."
The Creator Studio app isn't widely ava …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) Congresswoman denies staff used AI to write defense funding amendment
author: Emma Roth
content:
![Image of US Congress](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/01/STK481_STK432_CONGRESS_GOVERNMENT_CIVRGINIA_C.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-FL) says her staff used AI for "spellcheck" in an amendment summary for a major defense bill, but denies it was used for the bill text itself and says "NO Legislation is ever drafted with AI."

Luna issued the response after accounts on X [began sharing screenshots](https://x.com/RepLuna/status/2069848227398963384) of an amendment summary for the 2027 National Defense Authorization Act. It reads: "Identical to H.R. 100 (118th Congress).11:25 AM????Claude responded: Requires the Secretary of Defense to designate Department of Defense activities, support, and operations at the southwest land border as a named operation with…"

![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/ai-bill-luna.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,6.1935248525236,100,86.251039296683)via X">

At first, Luna's response seemingly indic …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/policy/956394/florida-anna-paulina-luna-anthropic-claude)

It reads: "Identical to H.R. 100 (118th Congress).11:25 AM????Claude responded: Requires the Secretary of Defense to designate Department of Defense activities, support, and operations at the southwest land border as a named operation with…"

creator: Reece Rogers
title: (No AI) How to Opt Out of Google Search’s New AI Data Training Feature
dc:creator: Reece Rogers
content: Google’s Search history update stores media uploads from your interactions, like images used in reverse image searches, for training its AI models.
contentSnippet: Google’s Search history update stores media uploads from your interactions, like images used in reverse image searches, for training its AI models.
